text.title: PLG Optimization Tactics Procedure
text.summary: 5-step procedure to produce a ranked tactic backlog for a specific funnel weakness.

step.name: pull-funnel-baseline
step.input: Funnel dashboard (activation / free-to-paid / expansion); reporting window ≥ 30 days.
step.action: Identify the weakest step; record metric name + current value + reporting window. If no baseline available, STOP and instrument first.
step.decision-gate: If no instrumented baseline, return precondition-not-met instead of fabricating tactics.

step.name: map-tactics-to-weak-step
step.input: Baseline + tactic family (activation / free-tier-balance / upgrade-prompts / self-serve-checkout / expansion-signals)
step.action: Sample 3-7 tactics from the catalog whose source_section matches the weak step. Reject duplicates against the prior cycle's backlog.

step.name: score-with-ice
step.input: Candidate tactics + ICE rubric (impact / confidence / ease on 1-10)
step.action: Score each tactic. Apply the ICE-scorer template to bucket into test_now / this_quarter / if_capacity / backlog.

step.name: write-upgrade-copy-variants
step.input: Tactics involving copy (upgrade prompts, feature gates, pricing-page rewrites)
step.action: For each, draft copy that names a comparable customer + quantifies value + names the plan. Run the banned-CTA filter.
step.decision-gate: If any variant matches the banned-phrase set, regenerate.

step.name: ship-as-prs
step.action: Emit a structured report (per the output contract) and open PR/ticket per tactic. Free-tier limit changes go to a separate finance + retention sign-off queue.
step.output: Backlog committed; PRs opened; sign-off queue populated for limit changes.
step.decision-gate: NEVER auto-merge a free-tier limit change.
